text0: The gang had been riding for awhile so the leader, Jeff decided to have them take a rest.
text1: He dismounted from his horse as the others looked on.
text2: Hailee, the only female in the group was concerned that something bad was going to happen as there had been some recent verbal exchanges between the men.
text3: Matt was one of the those who were at odds with the leader and he asked, "Do we have a plan or our we going to just wander the country side"?
text4: Jeff pulled out his pistol and responded by asking Matt if he wanted to be leader?
text5: Matt laughed it off and replied, "Only after one of us is dead!"

text0: A wily looking Daniel is trying to impress on his friends that he is not cheating them.
text1: The atmosphere in the bar where they are sitting, is dark, dingy and foreboding.
text2: Daniel realizes that his exhortations are not credible and tries to regroup and think of additional angles with which to persuade the group with Gary sitting behind him in stony silence and demeanor.

text0: The troop had regrouped in a remote island.
text1: The helicopter dropped more rescued paratroopers.
text2: They pitched a tent nearby and were camping there until they could be transported back to the country.
text3: They were excited to see each other after a gruelling assignment that had isolated most of them.
text4: Fredric was enjoying his first cigarette after months.
text5: Laurence couldn't wait to go back home.
text6: Martin drank his first cold beer in ages and it felt like the best beer he ever had.
text7: One of the men brought in a paper that he had stolen from the helicopter's stash. It had belonged to their officer.
text8: The men read it and realised that their government was planning to kill the team as they had been part of a covert mission that was unauthorised and couldn't risk it being leaked.
story: The troop had regrouped in a remote island. The helicopter dropped more rescued paratroopers. They pitched a tent nearby and were camping there until they could be transported back to the country. They were excited to see each other after a gruelling assignment that had isolated most of them. Fredric was enjoying his first cigarette after months. Laurence couldn't wait to go back home. Martin drank his first cold beer in ages and it felt like the best beer he ever had. text0: She hung the sheets in the sunshine, listening to the birdsong of morning, the breeze ruffling her hair.  She could hear the bang and crack of her husband splitting wood.
text1: He swung the axe high and slammed it down on the logs, one at a time, each splitting expertly into pieces that would fit in their wood stove.  He was in the rhythm of it, and it was satisfying work.
text2: She was heading back into their farmhouse when she heard the squawking of a chicken, and turned to see her husband beheading it with the axe.  It was going to be a good supper tonight, for a change.
text3: He called out to his wife, asking her to fetch water from the well.
text4: She ran to the well, knowing full well if she was not quick that he would punish her.
text5: She filled the bucket at the well.
text6: He looked down at the headless chicken and pondered the situation.  Living in this remote outpost was hard, he wondered if and when life would get easier.
text7: She ran back to him, water sloshing out of the pan, her bare feet padding against the cool dewy grass.

He looked down at the headless chicken and pondered the situation.  Living in this remote outpost was hard, he wondered if and when life would get easier. She ran back to him, water sloshing out of the pan, her bare feet padding against the cool dewy grass.

text0: Doctors at this hospital have been having a hard time keeping up with the amount of patients coming in due to the wide spread cases of a local disease.
text1: One of the patients named Jude had a special case of infections that led to many complications with his health.
text2: His significant other Nicole comes by in a rush to see how he is doing.
